frozen.description: Conditional-MI certification of orbit-phase privacy; bars preregistered.

design.orbit: great circle scene(R,Omega)=B0+R*(xi0u cosOmega + vu sinOmega); Q exactly constant
design.off_orbit: same-speed ellipse using the radial velocity vru (not G-tangent); Q varies
design.record: Y = <W, sample_cov(banks)>  (efficient matched score, fixed W at mid radius)
design.estimator: binned plug-in MI (bits), R-stratified conditional, shuffle-null debiased

frozen.note: A failed bar is a reported result, not a retry license (preregistration).
